layout_and_spacing.container: max-w-md mx-auto w-full min-h-screen bg-slate-50 relative pb-40 overflow-x-hidden
layout_and_spacing.card: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 p-5 shadow-[0_2px_10px_rgba(0,0,0,0.02)]
layout_and_spacing.sticky_bottom: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-white border-t border-slate-200 p-4 pb-safe shadow-[0_-12px_40px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] z-50 md:max-w-md md:mx-auto md:left-auto md:right-auto md:w-full rounded-t-2xl

header.style: sticky top-0 z-40 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-200 px-5 py-4 flex flex-col justify-center
header.rules: Text-only company name at the top (small, slate-500, font-bold uppercase), followed by the main title 'Configurador de Stock' (h1, slate-900).

selector_button.default: flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-4 rounded-xl border-2 border-slate-100 bg-white text-slate-600 transition-all active:scale-95 focus:outline-none

quantity_control.wrapper: flex items-center justify-between bg-slate-100 p-1.5 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 w-32
quantity_control.button: w-10 h-10 flex items-center justify-center bg-white rounded-lg shadow-sm text-slate-700 active:bg-slate-50 active:scale-95 transition-transform

whatsapp_button.style: w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-3 bg-[#25D366] hover:bg-[#16A34A] text-white font-bold py-4 px-6 rounded-xl active:scale-[0.98] transition-all shadow-lg shadow-green-500/20 text-lg

accessory_row.style: flex items-center justify-between py-3 border-b border-slate-100 last:border-0

interactions.hover_states: Subtle hover effects translated to active/tap states for mobile focus. Use active:scale-95 for tactile feedback on buttons.
interactions.animations: Use framer-motion. Animate the entrance of the Product Card and Accessories list (opacity 0 to 1, y: 10 to 0) to draw attention to the auto-calculated results.
interactions.toast: Use sonner for non-intrusive feedback (e.g., '16 Jacks recomendados añadidos') when the user adds a Bobina.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: This is a strictly MOBILE-FIRST, single-page application. Structure the main layout with a max-width wrapper (`max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen relative overflow-hidden bg-slate-50`) so it perfectly mimics a mobile app even on desktop monitors.

Use standard HTML tags (`div`, `section`, `button`) paired with Tailwind CSS for structural layout to maintain the required 'delivery app' aesthetic (large touch targets, rounded edges, generous padding). Avoid generic Shadcn cards for the main interactive grid; use custom tailored markup as defined in the guidelines.

Mocking the Excel Data: Since the user didn't upload the actual Excel file, create a constant JavaScript array/object mimicking the stock database. Structure: Projects (Oficina, CCTV, Data Center), Brands (Siemon, Panduit, CommScope). Products should include 'Bobina UTP Cat 6 [Brand]', and specific accessories like 'Jack RJ45 [Brand]', 'Patch Cord 1m [Brand]', 'Faceplate 2 puertos'.

Dynamic BOM & Auto-rule Logic: When a Brand and Project are selected, reveal the main product card (e.g., Bobina). When its quantity > 0, automatically render/suggest the related accessories below it. For every 1 Bobina added, auto-increment the accessories (e.g., +16 Jacks, +16 Patch Cords, +8 Faceplates). Allow the user to manually adjust these auto-suggested quantities using their own +/- buttons.

Sticky Bottom Summary: Create a fixed block at the bottom of the screen (`fixed bottom-0 w-full max-w-md bg-white p-4 border-t z-50`). It must show a brief text summary (e.g., '3 items seleccionados') and contain the large WhatsApp button.

WhatsApp Action CTA: The button must construct a `whatsapp://send?text=` or `https://wa.me/?text=` URI. Format the text logically: 'Hola, armé un presupuesto para un proyecto de [Project].%0A%0AItems:%0A- [Qty]x [Item 1]%0A- [Qty]x [Item 2]%0A%0A¿Me confirman disponibilidad y precio?'. Use `window.open(url, '_blank')` to trigger the app/web-whatsapp.
Do NOT use TypeScript (.tsx / .ts). Ensure all code is strictly standard JavaScript (.js / .jsx).

ALL interactive elements (buttons, quantity +/-, project selectors, brand selectors) MUST have a descriptive `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid='btn-project-cctv'`, `data-testid='btn-add-bobina'`).
Use `framer-motion` to smoothly animate the appearance of the main product card and the accessories list once the user makes their selections.
